item.dc:creator: thebigbaka

item.title: America 250 - Child Rapist President
item.dc:creator: danwhitfield

item.title: People selling you pseudoscience are only interested in unregulated marketing
item.description: Thanks to the_plant_slant for calling these out. The same people fear mongering about regulated medical science specifically pursue homeopathic remedies because supplements have no overhead, and therefore higher profits. Unregulated health and wellness is and industry that produced more than $2Billion dollars more in profit than healthcare last year. No certifications, no licenses, no testing, no oversight into what they sell you.
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: Joybait
item.description: Spread some compliments. They're free. Boosting someone on the choices they make, like their style, dress, strut, kindness, is very impacting. Complimenting traits that we have less control over such as body characteristics, skin tone, eye color, is less agentic to a person than their choices. Compliments aren't social exchanges. We toss it to someone to keep, and we move along with out day. Expecting a number, a smile, or a compliment back are obligations, not compliments. Spread some positivity in our corner of the world. Cheers
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: Woodturning a lamp is nothing new but that jig to cut the spirals was nicely done...
item.description:
Woodturning a lamp is nothing new but that jig to cut the spirals was nicely done...
Use a UV light you'll attract even more
I thought she looked familiar
Oh look, we're going to get a good night's sleep. THE MATTRESS.....
If this ship can float on water, it would be awesome.
Another testosterone dominated job.
The chances are low, but never zero
item.dc:creator: unfitpoisoning

item.title: I Visited Fake Germany!
item.description: Leavenworth, WA for those who have never been, pretty goofy and fun. I had a great time and was able to dust off my German again :D

item.title: Elon is a Nazi.
item.description:
And he REALLY wants this photo gone. But even now, I can hear you all saying, "Oh, look - you doctored up a fake photo. Okay, I see your bid, and raise you -
Roman Salute, my fat, hairy ass.

Valid.
It’s all about the vibe.
From one of my book groups. They wanted recs. cannot figure out the dude to the left. Edit: it’s Ganondorfffff!! Thanks!
…same book group….
Love it. Doesn’t really feel road-safe tho.
Meant to look up this movie and rewatch it.
Sound on
Hobbitcore
Surely it must be enhanced?

item.title: Canada Day
item.description: tRump has threatened to to “crush” our economy, “eliminate” our auto industry, cause a “total collapse” of the Canadian economy, and use “financial coercion” to “force” us to become the “51st state”. Everything in quotes are words that tRump himself uses repeatedly. In addition, tRump said, “he did not believe that the treaty that demarcates the border between the two countries was valid and that he wants to revise the boundary.” That’s why we don’t travel there or buy their stuff. Elbows up!
item.dc:creator: Resistance1000

item.title: Your hunger is your best sauce.
item.description: Braided chocolate pastry by : Nurgül Kotan. One love.

item.title: Thanks, cow rider!
item.description: Talk to someone. Get some help. Dying alone in silence is not worth it.

item.title: Two people, a man and a woman, have climbed to the top of the radio antenna atop the Empire State Building.
item.description: They're flying a banner that says, "When the power of love beats the love of power the world knows peace."
item.dc:creator: Lassannn

item.title: Memes vol 716
item.description:
Shoutout to they guy in my comment section who said I’d never experienced a video store because I’m gen z- LMFAOO ok buddy I’m pretty sure I’d know how I was raised but Y’know.
This is from riverdale
How’d they figure this out and how long did it take
I hate Eminem and then my boyfriend told me to look up “they’re trying to cancel who” and oh wow. He wrote a song about killing his wife. He sucks.
I saw a guy at the pharmacy when I was picking up my Prozac that said “even the devil on my shoulder sometimes whispers wtf are you up to now”
After I read Romeo and Juliet in high school I named my jellycat rabbit Benvolio because he’s who I played and I loved him
Me the other day when I wore my super cleavegey black dress and spiked collar and I told my friend I felt like I was appropriating goth culture
I’m going to encourage people to mur[REDACTED]
Bruce tax (and flat Bruce)
Gertie tax- this picture makes me want to cry my little lady is all grown up
Nessie tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: Good job Colorado!
item.description:
Yall elected a Zohran to Congress
And she took out someone who has been in congress 30 years. Sometimes change is good.
We can have a better government if we continue to elect better politicians
